title: stellaria nemorum subsp. montana
intro: Stellaria nemorum subsp. montana, also known as mountain chickweed, is a subspecies of the plant Stellaria nemorum within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This perennial herb is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and eye infections. The health benefits of mountain chickweed include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Mountain chickweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in folk remedies to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
